INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('ClickHouse'), ('clickhouse'), ('CLICKHOUSE'), ('Clichouse'), ('CLickHouse'), ('Some other string');
SELECT input_string, ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE Hash = ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8('clickhouse');
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string, 2) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE input_string LIKE '%other%';
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string, 4) AS Hash FROM test_strings ORDER BY Hash DESC;
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string) AS Hash, COUNT(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY Hash HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
WITH (SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE input_string LIKE '%Click%') AS subquery_hashes SELECT * FROM subquery_hashes;
WITH (SELECT input_string, ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string) AS Hash FROM test_strings) AS subquery SELECT Hash FROM subquery WHERE Hash = ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8('ClickHouse');
CREATE TABLE ngram_results AS SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string) AS Hash FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO ngram_results SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE input_string NOT LIKE '%other%';
SELECT Hash, COUNT() FROM ngram_results GROUP BY Hash ORDER BY COUNT() DESC;
